channel.title: Client Server on Avinash's blog
channel.description: Recent content in Client Server on Avinash's blog

item.title: Hello World of Remote Procedural Call (RPC)
item.description: A RPC call is used by client to do execute some function on the server. A basic running example of RPC call in which a client calls the server to do some mathematical tasks is discussed in this blog. To create an RPC program, you first write an IDL file where you define the ‘capability’ of your server i.e. the functions that it can execute. The program containing the functions in the IDL file are given numbers (IDs and versions).
